case_title: MAKHAN SINGH VS. TERESA VELASCO ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR SPANISH INTERPRETER FOR DEFENDANT

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-31-2023 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO OCT-10-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MAKHAN SINGH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TERESA VELASCO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JERRY VELASCO IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVIVCE ON DEFENDANT JERRY VELASCO. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. HONORABLE PANG LY FINDS THAT DEFENDANT TERESA VELASCO NEEDS A SPANISH INTERPRETER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-06-2023 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT CALENDAR TO AUG-08-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF HAS BEEN INFORMED BY PHONE REAGRDING OF THE CONTINUANCE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE FOR DEFENDANTS. CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER FILED BY SINGH, MAKHAN VELASCO, TERESA VELASCO, JERRY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-10-2023 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SINGH, MAKHAN AS TO DEFENDANT VELASCO, TERESA VELASCO, JERRY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-06-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY SINGH, MAKHAN VELASCO, TERESA VELASCO, JERRY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED MAY-19-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VELASCO, TERESA

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$NO AMOUNT GIVE);REMARKS: PER TERESA, JERRY DOES NOT RESIDES AT 2843 BRYANT ST FILED BY PLAINTIFF SINGH, MAKHAN AS TO DEFENDANT VELASCO, JERRY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-10-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-10-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ALLYSYN OVERTON. PLAINTIFF MAKHAN SINGH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TERESA VELASCO IS PRESENT AND IS ASSISTED BY SPANISH-LANGUAGE COURT INTERPRETER SHANNON RAINTREE ((#300563). DEFENDANT JERRY VELASCO IS PRESENT. ALMA CASTELLANOS IS PRESENT AS A WITNESS FOR DEFENDANTS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ALLYSYN OVERTON; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SINGH, MAKHAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT VELASCO, TERESA VELASCO, JERRY PLAINTIFF FAILS TO PROVE HIS CASE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
